Clean Browse Ledger — Strip tracking from URLs, log cookies and consent, capture privacy policies. All local.

================================================================================
CBL — Clean Browse Ledger
================================================================================

Strips utm_source, fbclid, gclid and more before pages load. Audits cookies, logs consent, and analyzes cookie policies. On-device.


──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
5 KEY FEATURES 
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• Pre-load URL cleaning — strips utm_source, fbclid, gclid, msclkid, and affiliate parameters before the page loads, with a full before/after record saved to history.

• Cookie inspection — snapshots all cookies for any domain with full detail: name, domain, path, expiration, remaining lifetime, secure, HttpOnly, SameSite, session vs. persistent, and partitioned flag.

• Consent detection — automatically logs when you click cookie banner buttons (Accept All, Reject All, Save Preferences, etc.) with a confidence level and the button text.

• Cookie policy analysis — when consent is detected, fetches the site's privacy policy and runs local keyword analysis to surface advertising cookies, data sharing, third-party vendors, opt-out language, and more.

• 100% on-device — no network requests, no telemetry, no analytics, no cloud processing. All data stays in chrome.storage.local.


──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
DESCRIPTION 
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

CBL — Clean Browse Ledger keeps an honest record of the tracking that follows you as you browse, and quietly cleans URLs before they load. No telemetry, no data sent anywhere. Everything runs locally.


WHAT IT DOES

Pre-load URL Cleaning
Before a page loads, CBL strips tracking parameters and redirects to the clean URL. This covers utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, fbclid, gclid, msclkid, and affiliate identifiers. Both the original and cleaned URL are saved to history.

Cookie Inspection
For any site you visit, CBL can snapshot all cookies for that domain, including subdomains. Each entry records the name, domain, path, expiration, remaining lifetime, secure, HttpOnly, SameSite policy, session vs. persistent status, and partitioned flag. Cookie values are not stored — only the length.

Consent Detection
When you click a cookie banner button — Accept All, Reject All, Save Preferences, or similar — CBL logs the action with the button text and a confidence level (certain, probable, or unknown).

Cookie Policy Capture and Analysis
When consent is detected, CBL finds the site's privacy policy, fetches the text, and runs a local keyword analysis. The report surfaces advertising cookies, analytics, personalization, data selling, named third-party vendors (40+ recognized), opt-out choices, retention periods, and consent withdrawal options. Results are labeled "what the policy says" — CBL makes no claim about what the site actually does.

Referral Source Attribution
CBL attributes tracking to its source: gclid to Google Ads, fbclid to Meta, msclkid to Microsoft Advertising, and UTM parameters by utm_source value. The HTTP referrer is also recorded.

History and Export
The History page shows a full timeline of events per domain: cleaned URLs, consent actions, cookie snapshots, and policy records. Filter by event type, search by domain, and export as JSON.

Custom Rules
Add your own parameter-stripping rules, enable or disable them individually, preview changes before saving, and import or export your rule set. A denylist exempts specific domains from cleaning.

Badge
A green badge on the extension icon shows how many URLs were cleaned and cookies found for the current tab.


PRIVACY

• All data is stored locally using chrome.storage.local — nothing leaves your device.
• Zero network requests to any third party.
• No analytics, telemetry, or crash reporting of any kind.
• Cookie policy analysis is local keyword matching — no AI, no cloud.
• Uncertain findings are labeled "unknown" rather than guessed at.


TECHNICAL

• Manifest V3
• Plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no third-party frameworks
• URL cleaning via declarativeNetRequest and webNavigation
• Storage via chrome.storage.local only


CBL is not a privacy shield or ad blocker. It does not block trackers or ads. It cleans URLs, records consent actions, and surfaces what cookie policies say — so you know what you agreed to and what followed you.
Scan, filter, and download page images with advanced extraction, overlay cleanup, and ZIP export.

Unshackle  helps you collect images from webpages without manual source hunting.
It can scan normal image tags, responsive sources (srcset/picture), CSS backgrounds, blob:/data: images, canvas snapshots, and inline SVG. 🖼️
Filter by size/type, sort results, preview items, batch-select, rename, and download individually or as a ZIP. 📦
Overlay cleanup tools (preview, remove, undo, keyword-based cleanup) help unblock pages where popups or masks hide images. 🧹
Network capture can pick up images loaded dynamically after page actions, and built-in duplicate removal reduces repeated files before export. ⚡
Site access is requested only when you run scan/capture actions. This safe build focuses on image workflows, some functions are locked in this version 🔒
Unshackle is open source. The full open-source version on GitHub includes more features than this Chrome Web Store safe build.

Inspect colors & images, capture screenshots, forge custom styles, and save presets.

PixelKit — All-in-One Web Design Inspector & Editor

  Extract colors, copy CSS, take screenshots, overlay grids, edit
  styles live, and test APIs — all inside your browser. PixelKit
  brings together the tools designers, developers, and QA teams use
  every day into a single extension.


  Why PixelKit?

  ✔ Work directly on the page you're viewing — no tab switching
  ✔ Replace 10+ separate extensions with one unified toolkit
  ✔ Skip heavy desktop apps like Figma or Postman — your browser is
  enough


  — Free Features —

  ▸ Color Picker
    Click any element to instantly extract its color. Supports HEX,
  RGB, HSL, and OKLCH formats. Every color you pick is saved to your
  history automatically.

  ▸ Hoverify (Element Inspector)
    Hover over any element to see its dimensions, tag, and class names
   at a glance. Click to view detailed CSS properties.

  ▸ Visible Area Screenshot
    Capture what you see in one click.

  ▸ Grid Overlay
    Display Figma-style grids on top of any page. Supports Columns,
  Rows, and Grid (px) types with multiple layers. Includes presets for
   Bootstrap 12-col, 8px Baseline, 960 Grid, and more. Freely adjust
  column count, gutter, margin, max width, color, and opacity.

  ▸ Image Detection
    Hover over images on the page to detect and download them
  instantly.


  — Pro Features —

  ▸ Palette Extractor
    Automatically analyze and categorize the key colors used on any
  page. Perfect for studying design systems or identifying brand
  colors.

  ▸ Font Inspector
    View font family, size, weight, line height, and other typography
  details for any selected element.

  ▸ Spacing Measurement
    Measure the exact pixel distance, padding, and margin between any
  two elements. Instantly verify if implementation matches the design
  spec.

  ▸ Contrast Checker (WCAG)
    Calculate the contrast ratio between background and text colors.
  Shows WCAG AA/AAA pass/fail status — essential for accessibility
  audits.

  ▸ CSS Copy
    Extract CSS from any selected element. Choose from 4 scopes: All,
  Typography, Layout, or Colors — copy only what you need.

  ▸ Area Selection Capture
    Drag to capture a precise region of the page.

  ▸ Full Page Capture
    Capture the entire page including scrollable areas as a single
  image.

  ▸ Annotated Capture
    Draw arrows, boxes, and text before capturing. Ideal for bug
  reports and design feedback.

  ▸ Visual Editor
    Click any element and edit its styles in real time — colors,
  fonts, sizes, and more. Supports Undo/Redo, and all changes can be
  saved as presets for later.

  ▸ Style Strip
    Progressively strip CSS in 4 levels: Grayscale → Remove
  backgrounds → Remove decorations → Naked HTML. Useful for analyzing
  layout structure or testing accessibility.

  ▸ Quick Themes
    Apply built-in themes like Dark Pro, Minimal White, and Terminal
  with one click. Great for dark mode testing or quick visual
  experiments.

  ▸ API Tester
    Send HTTP requests and inspect responses right in your browser —
  no Postman needed.

  ▸ CORS Bypass
    Toggle CORS restrictions on and off during development with a
  single click.

  ▸ Header Modifier
    Add or modify request and response headers freely. Test with
  different auth tokens, User-Agent strings, and more.

  ▸ GraphQL Client
    Execute GraphQL queries and inspect results instantly.

  ▸ JWT Decoder
    Paste any JWT token to automatically decode its header and
  payload.

  ▸ Cookie Manager
    View, edit, and delete cookies for the current domain.

  ▸ Response Viewer & TTFB
    Log API responses in real time and measure Time to First Byte.

  ▸ Dummy Data Generator
    Generate test data (names, emails, addresses, etc.) in JSON or CSV
   format instantly.

  ▸ Preset Manager
    Save your edited styles, hidden elements, and applied themes as
  presets. Reapply them anytime, and export/import as JSON to share
  with your team.


  — Who is PixelKit for? —

  • Designers — Analyze colors, fonts, and spacing from any live site
  in seconds
  • Frontend Developers — Copy CSS, experiment with styles in real
  time, and test APIs without leaving the browser
  • QA & Testers — Create clear bug reports with annotated screenshots
   and accessibility checks
  • PMs & Product Owners — Measure and verify the gap between design
  specs and actual implementation


  — Technical Details —

  • Built on Manifest V3
  • Shadow DOM ensures complete isolation from page styles
  • Zero impact on page performance (pointer-events: none overlay)
  • All data stored locally — nothing is sent to external servers
Never Lose Track: Keep Your Context Securely in the Sidebar!
Doober - Convert Prices to Hours of Your Life
Turn every price tag into hours of your life. Set your hourly rate and instantly see the real cost of everything you browse.

That $200 jacket? That's a full day of your life you'll never get back.

Doober converts every price on every website into the hours of work it would cost you. Set your hourly rate once, and a small badge appears next to every price you see: "⏱ 2.3h". Green if it's under an hour. Amber if it's a shift. Red if it's a week of your life.

It's the simplest way to shop smarter and spend less. No willpower required — just perspective.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

KEY FEATURES

• Price-to-hours conversion — Finds prices on any webpage and shows the equivalent work hours in a colour-coded badge (green under 1h, amber 1–8h, red 8h+)

• Works on every shopping site — Amazon, eBay, Google Shopping, Walmart, Etsy, food delivery, airline sites, and anywhere else prices appear

• 14+ currencies supported — USD, EUR, GBP, AUD, CAD, NZD, JPY, INR, BRL, KRW, CHF, SEK, NOK, DKK. Handles prefix ($49.99) and suffix (49,99 €) formats

• Spending tracker dashboard — Track your monthly total in hours worked with bar charts, category breakdowns, and daily averages

• Per-site control — Disable Doober on your bank, payroll, or any site with one toggle

• Monthly budget tracker — Set a budget in hours and see how you're tracking

• Keyboard shortcut — Ctrl+Shift+H toggles Doober on/off instantly

• CSV export — Download your complete spending history anytime

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

HOW IT WORKS

1. Install Doober and click the icon in your toolbar
2. Enter your hourly rate (salary, freelance rate, whatever you earn after tax)
3. Browse normally — Doober scans each page and adds time badges next to prices
4. Check your dashboard and see exactly how many hours of your life went to shopping this month

Takes 10 seconds to set up. No account. No email. No setup wizard. You'll see your first price conversion on the next page you open.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WITHOUT DOOBER vs. WITH DOOBER

Without: A $49 shirt is just a number on a screen.
With: That shirt is 2 hours on a Tuesday. You still buy it if you want it — but now you're choosing with your eyes open.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PRIVACY — YOUR DATA NEVER LEAVES YOUR BROWSER

Doober stores everything locally using Chrome's built-in storage:
• Your hourly rate — stored locally, never transmitted
• Purchase history — stored locally, clearable anytime
• Settings — stored locally
• Browsing data — not collected at all

There are no external servers, no analytics, no tracking pixels, no accounts to create. We don't collect, transmit, or sell any data. The extension requires only "storage", "tabs", and "webNavigation" permissions — nothing else.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

100% FREE — HERE'S HOW

Doober is completely free to use. We earn small affiliate commissions from Amazon and select retailers (via the Awin affiliate network) when you shop — at no extra cost to you. On Amazon, Doober may add an affiliate tag to the URL. On other supported retailers, Doober may redirect briefly through an affiliate link to set an attribution cookie.

We never overwrite existing affiliate links. If a creator or publisher sent you to a product page, their commission stays intact. You can turn affiliate support off anytime from the popup.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

FAQ

Q: Is Doober really free?
A: Yes, 100% free. No premium tier, no paywall, no catch. We're supported by small affiliate commissions at no cost to you.

Q: How does Doober make money?
A: Affiliate commissions from Amazon and select retailers via the Awin network. When you shop, a small commission goes to Doober — you pay the same price either way. Full details in the section above.

Q: Does Doober slow down my browsing?
A: No. Price detection runs in under 100ms on most pages with no network requests.

Q: Can I turn it off on certain sites?
A: Yes. Click the Doober icon and toggle per-site control. It remembers your preference.

Q: Is my hourly rate sent anywhere?
A: No. Your rate is stored locally in your browser and never transmitted.

Q: Does it work on non-English sites?
A: Yes. Doober detects prices by currency symbol and number format, so it works in any language.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Built for anyone who earns a wage and wants to understand what things actually cost.

Website: https://doober.io
Privacy Policy: https://doober.io/privacy
Terms: https://doober.io/terms
Changelog: https://doober.io/changelog

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MS Technet Secure runs 100% locally inside your browser using Chrome's declarativeNetRequest API. No browsing data, URLs, or personal information is ever collected, stored, or transmitted to any external server. We don't have a user database. We don't sell data. We don't track you.

2. Browse any site — ads, trackers, and malware are blocked instantly.
3. Click the toolbar icon to view your live blocking stats.
4. Use Settings to enable/disable filter categories or manage your whitelist.
5. To support a site, click "Pause on this site" to allow their ads.

# Zenaura - Deep Focus & Inspiration

Transform your browsing experience with Zenaura, the premium productivity dashboard designed for deep focus and digital wellness.

## Key Features:

### 🚀 Advanced Focus Mode
Stay in the zone with our dedicated Focus Mode. When enabled, Zenaura provides a sleek **Command Bar** on every webpage you visit, featuring:
- **Main Task Tracker**: Keep your primary goal visible at all times.
- **Site Shield**: Quickly toggle protection for distracting domains to stay on track.

### 🎵 Immersive Soundscapes
Curate your focus environment with high-quality ambient sounds, from soothing rain to rhythmic lo-fi beats.

### 📋 Minimalist Task Management
Start every session with intention by setting your primary focus. Zenaura's clean interface removes clutter and keeps your mission front and center.

### 🛡️ Digital Wellness & Intentionality
Battle mindless scrolling with our "Intentionality Wall." Set a timer and reflect on your purpose before visiting distracting sites.

### ⌨️ Power User Shortcuts
Full keyboard navigation support to toggle focus, customize sounds, and manage your workspace without ever touching your mouse.

## Why Zenaura?
Zenaura isn't just a new tab page; it's a focus environment that provides a consistent, calming space to help you stay committed to your goals.

Real-time risk intelligence layer that protects you from AI tool privacy and security risks.

Crater is a real-time risk intelligence layer for the AI tools you already use.
Every time you open ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, Gemini, Perplexity, or any of 100+ AI tools, Crater scores the privacy risk — based on what the tool's policies actually allow, what trackers its site runs, and what data it can see about you. You get the score at a glance, in the side panel, before you type anything sensitive.

WHY CRATER
AI tools are the fastest-growing surface for data leakage. Most people don't read the policies. Most policies change without notice. Crater gives you a live read on what each AI tool is doing with your data — so you can decide what to share, and what to keep.

WHAT YOU GET
• Real-time privacy score (0–100) for every AI tool you visit
• Plain-language breakdown: what the tool stores, trains on, and shares
• Side-panel dashboard with risk history across sessions
• Built-in registry of 100+ AI tools, kept up to date with each release
• In-page alerts when a tool's behavior looks unusually risky

PRIVACY BY DESIGN
Crater itself collects zero data. Everything runs locally in your browser:
• No analytics, no telemetry, no tracking
• No URLs, prompts, or inputs leave your device
• No account needed — install and go
• Open permissions disclosure in our privacy policy

FREE FOREVER FOR INDIVIDUALS
Crater is free to use with no paywall, no login, no upsell. Teams can reach out at hemang@sidetake.com for organization-wide rollouts.
Questions, feature requests, or concerns? hemang@sidetake.com
Privacy-first web safety — blocklist + SafeSearch + on-device heuristics; PIN-locked overrides, HTTPS alerts, encrypted logs.

Safeguard (SafeBrowse AI)

Safeguard (SafeBrowse AI) is built for parents, schools, and teams who want safer browsing without giving up privacy. It helps prevent accidental exposure to harmful content using on-device protection—so your browsing data stays on your computer, not on a server.

Why you’ll want it:

For families: pick an age profile in seconds, lock changes with a PIN, and keep kids safer while they explore.
For classrooms: enable a lockdown mode to keep lessons on track and reduce risky or distracting content.
For workplaces/teams: use Focus Mode to cut distractions and keep browsing aligned with policy and productivity goals.
Unlike “cloud” filters, Safeguard doesn’t require accounts or telemetry. It enforces SafeSearch, supports blocklists/allowlists, and keeps override activity encrypted locally (no full URLs stored).

How to use:
1) Install and open the popup; toggle Enable (badge shows ON)
2) Optional: toggle Aggressive mode and adjust Sensitivity
3) Optional: paste domains (one per line) into Blocklist → Import/Replace; use Allowlist to override

Notes:
- Very large blocklists may exceed Chrome’s dynamic DNR capacity; core heuristics still protect
- Cross-origin videos may block pixel reads; visual sampling is skipped in those cases
Enhance you focus, manage your time effectively, and harness the power of productive browsing.

Maximize Your Productivity, Minimize Distractions

Welcome to Zenlify, the ultimate Chrome extension designed for those seeking to enhance their focus, manage their time effectively, and harness the power of productive browsing. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone in between, Zenlify is your digital companion in achieving unparalleled efficiency.

Key Features:

Pomodoro Timer for Focused Work Sessions: Engage in deep work with our integrated Pomodoro timer. Customize your focus sessions and breaks to fit your workflow and stay on track with your tasks.

Session Logging & Google Calendar Sync: Automatically log your focus sessions and integrate them with Google Calendar. Gain insights into your productive hours and streamline your scheduling.

Comprehensive Browsing Analytics: Discover your digital habits with detailed statistics. Track time spent and frequency of visits on each website, empowering you to make informed decisions about your browsing behavior.

Website Blocking & Management: Say goodbye to digital distractions. Block access to websites that interrupt your focus, and manage your list of blocked sites with ease.

Tab Limitation for Clutter-Free Browsing: Keep your browser tidy and your mind clear by limiting the number of open tabs. Concentrate on what's important without the overwhelm of excessive tabs.

YouTube Distraction Shield: Stay focused on your purpose on YouTube by hiding recommendation videos. Eliminate the lure of the endless browsing loop.

Ad-Blocking & Content Filtering: Enjoy a cleaner, faster, and more focused browsing experience. Block intrusive ads and hide content based on your preferred keywords.

Why Choose Zenlify?

Customizable to Your Needs: Tailor features like the "Pomodoro timer" and content filters to fit your personal workflow and preferences.
Insightful Data for Self-Improvement: Use your browsing analytics to identify areas for productivity enhancement.
User-Friendly Interface: Simple, intuitive, and easy to navigate, allowing you to start improving your productivity right away.

Sarcastic focus tracker that measures domains and keeps your procrastination index in check.

Professional Relay Auto Booker and Refresher for Amazon Relay loadboard.

THIS AUTO REFRESHER AND AUTOBOOKER HAS THREE MODES TO HELP THE REFRESHING AND BOOKING PROCESS.

FEATURES

-ALERT MODE-  AUTOMATICALLY REFRESHES THE LOAD BOARD AND ALERTS THE USER WHEN A NEW LOAD APPEARS VISUALLY AND BY SOUND.

-SEARCH MODE- HAS CERTAIN FEATURES WHICH ALLOW THE USER TO SEARCH WITH SPECIFIC PARAMETERS TO THE LOAD THEY NEED. 

-AUTOBOOK- THIS FEATURE ALLOWS THE USER TO INPUT THEIR CERTAIN PARAMETERS IN AND HAVE THE BOOKING PROCESS FULLY AUTOMATED GIVING THEM HIGHER CHANCE OF BOOKING THE LOAD. 

-FAST BOOK- USED IN SEARCH MODE AND ALERT MODE, WHICH ALLOWS USERS TO USE THE ONE CLICK FEATURE TO BOOKING LOAD WHEN IT APPEARS. 

-AUTO EXPANDING- THIS FEATURE AUTOMATICALLY OPENS UP THE LOAD FOR THE USER TO BE ABLE TO SEE THE DETAILS OF THE TRIP GIVING A HIGHER CHANCE OF THE BOOKING THE LOAD QUICKER. 

-LOCATION FEATURES- THIS AUTO REFRESHER HAS OPTIONS TO EXCLUDE CERTAIN FACILITY FROM THE SEARCH AND OPTION TO ONLY SEE FROM CERTAIN LOCATIONS. WHITELIST GIVES THE OPTION FOR REFRESHING OR AUTOBOOKING TO BE ABLE TO EITHER BOOK OR HAVE THE SYSTEM STOP ON CERTAIN LOADS FROM CERTAIN LOCATIONS. EXCLUDE IS THE OPPOSITE OF THAT WHICH DOES NOT STOP THE REFRESHER AND DOES NOT BOOK FROM CERTAIN LOCATIONS ENTERED.

Keyboard-first AI text actions. Select text, press the shortcut, and transform — rewrite, summarize, translate, and more.

Select any text on any page, press a shortcut, and choose your action. The result drops back in place of what you selected. 

Free:
• Rewrite, summarize, fix grammar, explain, shorten, expand, key points
• Translate to 41 languages
• Read aloud in any voice your browser supports
• Runs on Chrome's built-in AI. Fast, private, no API key needed.

Pro: ($5 per month)
• Bring your own AI. Run models locally, or use your own cloud AI keys.
• Always use the latest models. One click pulls your provider's newest releases.
• Create action chains that run one action after another
• Create your own custom actions
• Per-site profiles with ready-made actions, like tweet, reply, and thread on X

Your text stays yours:
Actions run on your device through Chrome's AI. Nothing leaves your computer. If you connect a cloud AI with your own key, your text goes to that service. We never see it. Full policy at clipaction.dev/privacy.

Built-in AI requires Chrome 138+. Other Chromium browsers (Brave, Edge, Opera) work but need a cloud API key or Ollama.
The Shield Wall: 10 layers blocking phishing, dark patterns, AI chat spying, and QR scams. For families.

Detailed Description:
  Click Protect gives you and your family one-button protection from today's most dangerous online threats — phishing, malware sites, AI prompt injection, and social engineering.

  🛡️  WHAT IT DOES
  • Blocks known phishing and malware URLs using threat intelligence feeds (PhishTank, URLhaus, Google Safe Browsing)
  • Detects AI prompt injection attempts on web pages
  • Identifies social engineering tactics in real time
  • Scans pages for phishing indicators using on-device heuristics
  • Shows a clear blocked-page warning before you reach dangerous sites

  🔒 PRIVACY-FIRST
  All threat detection runs locally in your browser — no page content, browsing history, or full URLs ever leave your device. Only hashed URL lookups and minimal threat event summaries are sent to our servers.
  Choose from three privacy levels:
    • Standard — Full threat reporting with URL hashes
    • Strict — Redacted hashes, threat type only
    • Fortress — Zero data sent, 100% local protection

  👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 BUILT FOR FAMILIES
  Family admins can manage protection for every member from a single dashboard. See threat activity, adjust settings per device, and keep everyone safe without needing technical expertise.

  ⚡ SIMPLE TO USE
  One click to activate. No configuration required. Protection starts immediately.

  PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED
  Click Protect requests only the permissions necessary for protection:
  • declarativeNetRequest — Block dangerous URLs before they load
  • storage — Save your settings and protection state
  • activeTab & scripting — Scan the current page for threats
  • alarms — Schedule blocklist updates and heartbeats
  • tabs — Open the dashboard and blocked-page warnings

  No data is sold. No ads. No tracking.

  Privacy Policy: https://app.clickprotect.ai/privacy
  Support: support@clickprotect.ai

Proactively blocks restricted actions on sensitive platforms.

SafeWall

SafeWall is a powerful browser extension designed to protect your online activities by proactively blocking restricted actions on sensitive platforms. It helps individuals and organizations enforce compliance, maintain data privacy, and prevent unintended actions, all while offering seamless usability.

Key Features

Real-Time Action Blocking
Blocks sensitive actions like copy, paste, file uploads, and downloads on restricted platforms.
Prevents accidental sharing of confidential data.

Keyword Monitoring
Detects and blocks restricted keywords (e.g., "confidential", "sensitive") in input fields, text editors, and search boxes.

Dynamic Platform Control
Customize the list of restricted platforms and actions based on your needs.
Update settings easily to adapt to evolving organizational policies.

Action Alerts
Receive clear notifications when an action is blocked, helping you stay informed without disrupting your workflow.
Silent Logging

Logs blocked actions and attempts for compliance and reporting, stored securely in your browser.

Who Should Use SafeWall?
Professionals: Ensure sensitive data stays protected in work environments.
Organizations: Enforce compliance with data protection policies.
Students: Avoid distractions and stay focused on productivity.

Why Choose SafeWall?
SafeWall empowers you with control over your online activities, ensuring compliance and security without compromising usability. Stay protected while you browse!
